entities.name: GENEBANKS
entities.description: Facilities that conserve and distribute agrobiodiversity to support food security

entities.name: GLOBAL FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: AGROBIODIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety and variability of animals, plants and micro-organisms used for food and agriculture

entities.name: RESEARCH
entities.description: Systematic investigation into materials and sources to establish facts and reach new conclusions

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The process of producing offspring with specific desired traits

entities.name: CGIAR COLLECTIONS
entities.description: Large-scale seed accessions held by the Consultative Group on International Agricultural Research

entities.name: SEED ACCESSIONS
entities.description: Unique samples of seeds stored in a genebank

entities.name: GLOBAL PUBLIC GOODS
entities.description: Resources that are non-excludable and non-rivalrous on a global scale

entities.name: VIABILITY MONITORING DATA
entities.description: Historical data used to track the survival and germination capacity of stored seeds

entities.name: CGIAR GENEBANKS
entities.description: Physical facilities managed by CGIAR for the conservation of plant genetic resources

entities.name: SEED VIABILITY
entities.description: The ability of a seed to germinate and grow into a healthy plant

entities.name: CROPS
entities.description: Cultivated plants that are grown as food or for other economic purposes

entities.name: MANAGEMENT PROCEDURES
entities.description: The protocols and practices used to maintain seed collections

entities.name: LONGEVITY
entities.description: The length of time a seed remains viable under specific storage conditions

entities.name: REGENERATION REQUIREMENTS
entities.description: The need to grow out stored seeds to refresh the seed stock

entities.name: SEED LOTS
entities.description: Groups of seeds of the same species and origin stored together

entities.name: ACCESSION MONITORING INTERVALS
entities.description: The scheduled frequency at which seed viability is checked
